items.claim: Terrence McKinney has a switch stance advantage over King Green.
items.quote: He's a switch dance fighter. That's always an advantage.

items.claim: King Green has a 72% takedown defense rate.
items.quote: Green has a 72% takedown defense, which is not bad.

items.claim: Terrence McKinney has not been out of the first round in his last seven fights.
items.quote: this guy hasn't been out of the first round in man about seven fights.

items.claim: Terrence McKinney will be able to land takedowns on King Green and utilize ground and pound.
items.quote: I think Terence McKenna is going to land takedowns at some point and utilize the ground and pound.

items.claim: Brandon Royval has a 45% takedown defense rate.
items.quote: Roy Val's got a 45% takedown defense.

items.claim: Loner Kavanagh has a 94% takedown defense rate.
items.quote: Kavanaaugh 94% takedown defense. That's impressive so far.

items.claim: Cory Sandhagen's takedown defense percentage dropped to 56% after the Merab Dvalishvili fight.
items.quote: all of a sudden Marab Devalos really came in and took him down 20 times. So it dropped that thing way back down to 56%.

items.claim: Mario Bautista will be able to hang with Cory Sandhagen on the feet due to the small reach discrepancy.
items.quote: Bautista is going to be able to hang on the feet.

items.claim: Benoit Saint-Denis has a significant advantage in the takedown game over Paddy Pimblett.
items.quote: the takedown game goes to Saint Deni who lands like a takedown and a half per round.

items.claim: Paddy Pimblett has a 44% takedown defense rate.
items.quote: the takedown defense of Patty the Batty's important here, right? 44%.

items.claim: Conor McGregor has a 5-inch reach advantage over Max Holloway.
Max Holloway will out-land Conor McGregor in significant strikes over a five-round fight.
items.quote: if it goes five rounds as well, Holloway is going to lead by 25 to 45 significant strikes
